mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback (user_id, user_name, title, content, images, type, status, order_no, appointment_no, contact) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{title}, #{content}, #{images}, #{type}, 0, #{orderNo}, #{appointmentNo}, #{contact})
mapper.update: UPDATE feedback SET status = #{status}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE feedback SET status = 2, process_result = #{processResult}, process_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE status = #{status}
